Task.Title: Pick up held mail and sort bills
Task.Notes: Three weeks of mail stacks up. Watch for the DOT renewal notice and the apartment paperwork.

Task.Title: F-150 oil change and tire rotation
Task.Notes: Truck is the home time vehicle. Full synthetic. Check the brake pads while it is up.

Task.Title: Barber, then groceries for the apartment
Task.Notes: Same barber as always. Keep the grocery run light, gone again in a week.

Task.Title: Confirm Sunday dinner with Tammy
Task.Notes: Text Tammy by Thursday. Mama Jean will be there. Bring nothing fancy, just show up.

Task.Title: Drive to Tuscaloosa, check on Mama Jean
Task.Notes: One hour each way. Look at the porch light she mentioned. Top off her pantry.

Task.Title: Confirm CPAP supply auto ship
Task.Notes: Filters and cushion. Auto pay already on file with the supplier.

Task.Title: Review IRA transfer and savings for the month
Task.Notes: Confirm the 500 dollar IRA transfer cleared. Move anything extra to the high yield account.

Task.Title: Patch the spare room and put away hunting gear
Task.Notes: Small drywall touch up. Stack the boxes so the guitar case is reachable.
